race.description: Free Entry To Belmont Park Mdn
race.comment: REMINISCENCE (2) showed good talent in his debut campaign despite not winning, flying home in Open 3YO grade to be 1.8L off the winner before the break. Back to maiden grade now and he gets Pike on board from an inside draw with the blinkers on first time. He ticks plenty of boxes. WESTERN MISS (14) is on debut today for the Grantham stable, finishing runner-up in her latest trial. Pike was on board there and opts to ride REMINISCENCE here which is a query, but she's a well-bred filly who has shown ability. Can get off the mark right away. ENCHANTED MISS (7) finished off well from beyond midfield at Albany off a very long break, handling the heavy going to miss by 0.3L. Second-up now and drawn a better gate, she can raise the bar and be in the thick of the action once again. MISS BICKMORE (13) is another debutant and gets CJP on board. Can't be discounted on what she's shown at the trials. ROCKING IN VEGAS (1) can feature following a strong return effort.
